# GitHub Copilot Instructions

- This repository is a bilingual personal site and technical blog for Sean Chen, not a generic starter template.
- Read `docs/ai/project-context.md` before making architectural or content-structure changes.
- Read `docs/ai/blog-publishing-policy.md` before drafting, translating, or publishing blog content.
- Keep `zh-TW` at root routes and English under `/en`.
- Use `localizePath()` for static links and `post.path` for MDX post links.
- Public personal pages and published blog posts should have both Chinese and English versions.
- Keep instruction and skill files concise and point deeper detail to `docs/ai/*`.
